description: CompositionOrange rubber basket ball made with synthetic rubber and jersey designCare1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washIncrease your performance level with this NBA Certified Basketball from spalding. The Nash No. 13 jersey design on the ball is inspired by basketball legend Steve Nash - the pulse of the NBA. Engineered with spalding technology, it is made of a top grade rubber cover and is ideal for outdoor street ball or court games.
